checksum.algorithm: sha256 over sorted unique normalized text hashes

contamination_leakage_notes: Synthetic fixture only; exact normalized text hashes are checked for overlap between train and validation.
dedup_strategy: Unicode NFKC normalization, line-ending normalization, trailing-space trim, then exact normalized text sha256 deduplication.
language_mix: English, Japanese, and mixed Japanese/English technical sentences.

leakage_check.method: exact normalized text sha256 intersection between train and validation splits

license: Repo-authored fixture for this project; no third-party text source.
split_method: Deterministic sha256 ordering by seed, record id, and normalized text hash with validation_fraction=0.25.
tokenized_metadata_format: JSON sidecar with token file paths, dtype, sha256, tokenizer id, and split names
url_or_local_note: Repo-authored local synthetic English/Japanese smoke corpus embedded in configs/tokenizer_bilingual.yaml.
